import pytest
# from your_module import is_balanced_parens


class TestIsBalancedParens:
    """Unit tests for is_balanced_parens."""

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    # Happy Path
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("s, expected", [
        ("", True),                      # empty string
        ("()", True),                    # simple pair
        ("[]", True),                    # simple brackets
        ("{}", True),                    # simple braces
        ("()[]{}", True),                # sequential groups
        ("({[]})", True),                # nested mixed
        ("{[()()][]}", True),            # complex nested
        ("a(b)c", True),                 # non-bracket chars ignored
        ("(a{b[c]d}e)", True),           # text interspersed
        ("no brackets at all", True),    # no brackets present
    ])
